items.comment: (There's no water in their world; now, surrounded by water, Tif has an idea).
items.text:
So I'm telling you,
we bring some gourds
on a big big cart,

we fill them up with water,
bring it all back home,
and we'll be rich.

Will the water behave the same way
back home? Or will it -- poof apart?

items.comment: Todo: I don't want to be next to a cartload of water exploding violently into mist.
items.text:
I don't think I want to be around
a cartload of water if it explodes
into mist.
